block.name: ng_tract_bridge.py: delete _peer_events dead code + re-vendor to all 8 modules (#155)
acceptance_criteria: self._peer_events no longer exists in canonical ng_tract_bridge.py
_enforce_window_limit() no longer exists in canonical ng_tract_bridge.py
All 8 vendored copies match canonical (same _peer_events absence)

outputs.name: ng_tract_bridge.py
outputs.contract: _peer_events and _enforce_window_limit deleted; all dead code removed

never: Do not modify neuro_foundation.py, openclaw_hook.py, or any protected NeuroGraph file
Do not change the signatures or docstrings of get_recommendations() or detect_novelty()
Do not restart any running service
Do not modify any file other than ng_tract_bridge.py copies and the punchlist
anti_drift: Only delete _peer_events infrastructure and its dead code. Do not refactor, rename, or restructure any other part of ng_tract_bridge.py.

steps.description: Check if _peer_events still exists in canonical — skip all edits if already clean
Apply all 8 edits only if _peer_events still present

if_true.description: Write Python patch script to /tmp for all 8 edits

params.command:
cat > /tmp/ng155_patch.py << 'PYEOF'
import sys

path = '/home/josh/NeuroGraph/ng_tract_bridge.py'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
errors = []

# Edit 1: Remove _peer_events init block (lines ~387-391)
OLD1 = (
    '\n        # Cross-module event cache (for recommendations and novelty)\n'
    '        # Holds typed BTF entry objects (PyOutcomeEntry, PyTopologyEntry,\n'
    '        # PyExperienceEntry) and/or legacy dicts from JSONL fallback.\n'
    '        self._peer_events: List[Any] = []\n'
    '        self._peer_events_max = 50_000\n'
)
if c.count(OLD1) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit1: found {c.count(OLD1)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD1, '\n', 1)
    print('edit1_ok: removed _peer_events init block')

# Edit 2: Simplify record_outcome() — remove peer_count block
OLD2 = (
    '        # Return cross-module insights from cached peer events\n'
    '        peer_count = len(self._peer_events)\n'
    '        if peer_count > 0:\n'
    '            return {\n'
    '                "cross_module": True,\n'
    '                "peer_events_cached": peer_count,\n'
    '                "peer_modules": list(set(\n'
    '                    self._get_module_id(e) for e in self._peer_events\n'
    '                    if self._get_module_id(e) != self.module_id\n'
    '                )),\n'
    '            }\n'
    '\n'
    '        return {"cross_module": True, "peer_events_cached": 0}'
)
NEW2 = '        return {"cross_module": True, "peer_events_cached": 0}'
if c.count(OLD2) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit2: found {c.count(OLD2)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD2, NEW2, 1)
    print('edit2_ok: simplified record_outcome return')

# Edit 3: Remove dead code in get_recommendations() after return None
OLD3 = (
    '        # (#155 test: returning None lets ng_lite.py fall through to _core.get_recommendations)\n'
    '        self._drain_all()\n'
    '        return None\n'
    '\n'
    '        emb = self._normalize(embedding)\n'
    '\n'
    '        scored: List[Tuple[str, float, str]] = []\n'
    '        for event in self._peer_events:\n'
    '            event_module = self._get_module_id(event)\n'
    '            if event_module == module_id:\n'
    '                continue\n'
    '\n'
    '            peer_emb = self._get_embedding(event)\n'
    '            if peer_emb is None or peer_emb.size == 0 or peer_emb.shape[0] != emb.shape[0]:\n'
    '                continue\n'
    '\n'
    '            peer_emb = self._normalize(peer_emb)\n'
    '            similarity = float(np.dot(emb, peer_emb))\n'
    '\n'
    '            if similarity >= self._relevance_threshold:\n'
    '                target = self._get_target_id(event)\n'
    '                reasoning = (\n'
    '                    f"Cross-module recommendation from {event_module} "\n'
    '                    f"(similarity={similarity:.3f})"\n'
    '                )\n'
    '                scored.append((target, similarity, reasoning))\n'
    '\n'
    '        if not scored:\n'
    '            return None\n'
    '\n'
    '        scored.sort(key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)\n'
    '        seen_targets: set = set()\n'
    '        deduped: List[Tuple[str, float, str]] = []\n'
    '        for target, sim, reason in scored:\n'
    '            if target not in seen_targets:\n'
    '                seen_targets.add(target)\n'
    '                deduped.append((target, sim, reason))\n'
    '                if len(deduped) >= top_k:\n'
    '                    break\n'
    '\n'
    '        return deduped\n'
)
NEW3 = (
    '        # Substrate handles cross-module similarity; drain River then defer to _core.\n'
    '        self._drain_all()\n'
    '        return None\n'
)
if c.count(OLD3) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit3: found {c.count(OLD3)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD3, NEW3, 1)
    print('edit3_ok: removed dead code in get_recommendations')

# Edit 4: Remove dead code in detect_novelty() after return None
OLD4 = (
    '        # (#155 test: returning None lets ng_lite.py fall through to _core.detect_novelty)\n'
    '        self._drain_all()\n'
    '        return None\n'
    '\n'
    '        emb = self._normalize(embedding)\n'
    '        max_similarity = 0.0\n'
    '\n'
    '        for event in self._peer_events:\n'
    '            peer_emb = self._get_embedding(event)\n'
    '            if peer_emb is None or peer_emb.size == 0 or peer_emb.shape[0] != emb.shape[0]:\n'
    '                continue\n'
    '\n'
    '            peer_emb = self._normalize(peer_emb)\n'
    '            similarity = float(np.dot(emb, peer_emb))\n'
    '            if similarity > max_similarity:\n'
    '                max_similarity = similarity\n'
    '\n'
    '        return max(0.0, 1.0 - max_similarity)\n'
)
NEW4 = (
    '        # Substrate handles cross-module novelty; drain River then defer to _core.\n'
    '        self._drain_all()\n'
    '        return None\n'
)
if c.count(OLD4) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit4: found {c.count(OLD4)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD4, NEW4, 1)
    print('edit4_ok: removed dead code in detect_novelty')

# Edit 5: Simplify sync_state() return — remove _peer_events refs
OLD5 = (
    '        return {\n'
    '            "synced": True,\n'
    '            "drain_count": self._drain_count,\n'
    '            "peer_events_cached": len(self._peer_events),\n'
    '            "peer_modules": list(set(\n'
    '                self._get_module_id(e) for e in self._peer_events\n'
    '                if self._get_module_id(e) != self.module_id\n'
    '            )),\n'
    '        }\n'
    '\n'
    '    # -------------------------------------------------------------------\n'
    '    # Connection management'
)
NEW5 = (
    '        return {\n'
    '            "synced": True,\n'
    '            "drain_count": self._drain_count,\n'
    '            "peer_events_cached": 0,\n'
    '            "peer_modules": [],\n'
    '        }\n'
    '\n'
    '    # -------------------------------------------------------------------\n'
    '    # Connection management'
)
if c.count(OLD5) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit5: found {c.count(OLD5)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD5, NEW5, 1)
    print('edit5_ok: simplified sync_state return')

# Edit 6: Remove _peer_events.extend + _enforce_window_limit call from _drain_all
OLD6 = (
    '        # Add to cache, maintaining bounded size\n'
    '        self._peer_events.extend(new_events)\n'
    '        self._enforce_window_limit()\n'
    '\n'
    '        if new_events:'
)
NEW6 = '        if new_events:'
if c.count(OLD6) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit6: found {c.count(OLD6)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD6, NEW6, 1)
    print('edit6_ok: removed _peer_events.extend from _drain_all')

# Edit 7: Delete _enforce_window_limit method
OLD7 = (
    '    def _enforce_window_limit(self) -> None:\n'
    '        """Trim accumulated peer events to rolling-window max.\n'
    '\n'
    '        Absorb ALL events at drain time; evict oldest only after absorption\n'
    '        exceeds the window. Matches Darwin recorder._enforce_window_limit\n'
    '        (50k). Never cap mid-drain -- Law 7: no experience dropped at intake.\n'
    '        """\n'
    '        if len(self._peer_events) > self._peer_events_max:\n'
    '            excess = len(self._peer_events) - self._peer_events_max\n'
    '            self._peer_events = self._peer_events[excess:]\n'
    '\n'
    '    def _drain_single_tract('
)
NEW7 = '    def _drain_single_tract('
if c.count(OLD7) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit7: found {c.count(OLD7)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD7, NEW7, 1)
    print('edit7_ok: deleted _enforce_window_limit method')

# Edit 8: Fix stats() peer_events_cached line
OLD8 = '            "peer_events_cached": len(self._peer_events),'
NEW8 = '            "peer_events_cached": 0,'
if c.count(OLD8) != 1:
    errors.append(f'edit8: found {c.count(OLD8)}x (expected 1)')
else:
    c = c.replace(OLD8, NEW8, 1)
    print('edit8_ok: fixed stats() peer_events_cached')

# Edit 9: Add changelog entry
CHANGELOG_MARKER = '# [2026-04-19] Claude Code (Sonnet 4.6) — Punchlist #155 test:'
if CHANGELOG_MARKER in c:
    NEW_ENTRY = (
        '# [2026-04-20] Codemine (BLK-NG-155) -- delete _peer_events dead code (#155 cleanup)\n'
        '#   What: Removed _peer_events list, _peer_events_max, _enforce_window_limit(),\n'
        '#          dead code in get_recommendations() and detect_novelty(), and all\n'
        '#          _peer_events refs from record_outcome(), sync_state(), _drain_all(), stats().\n'
        '#   Why:  Test period (2026-04-19) confirmed no regressions. get_recommendations()\n'
        '#         and detect_novelty() now permanently defer to _core substrate (ng_lite.py).\n'
        '#         _peer_events was an ever-growing cache that shadowed Hebbian learning.\n'
        '#   How:  8 targeted replacements. All count==1 guards passed before apply.\n'
    )
    if NEW_ENTRY[:40] not in c:
        c = c.replace(CHANGELOG_MARKER, NEW_ENTRY + CHANGELOG_MARKER, 1)
        print('edit9_ok: changelog entry added')
    else:
        print('edit9_skip: changelog already present')
else:
    errors.append('edit9: changelog marker not found')

if errors:
    print('PATCH_ERRORS: ' + '; '.join(errors))
    sys.exit(1)

open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c)
print('PATCHES_APPLIED')
PYEOF
echo SCRIPT_WRITTEN

if_true.description: Execute the patch script against canonical ng_tract_bridge.py

steps.description: Confirm _peer_events and _enforce_window_limit are gone from canonical
Verify canonical compiles clean after patches
Copy cleaned canonical to all 8 vendored module locations

params.command: SRC=/home/josh/NeuroGraph/ng_tract_bridge.py; for dest in /home/josh/The-Inference-Difference/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/ecosystem-monitor/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/Darwin/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/Bunyan/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/Elmer/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/The-Healing-Collective/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/Immunis/ng_tract_bridge.py /home/josh/TrollGuard/ng_tract_bridge.py; do cp "$SRC" "$dest" && echo "VENDORED: $dest"; done && echo REVENDOR_DONE

steps.description: Commit canonical ng_tract_bridge.py to NeuroGraph repo

params.command: cd /home/josh/NeuroGraph && git add ng_tract_bridge.py && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'Delete _peer_events dead code from ng_tract_bridge.py (#155 cleanup)' && git push && echo CANONICAL_DONE

steps.description: Commit re-vendored ng_tract_bridge.py in each module repo

params.command: MSG='Re-vendor ng_tract_bridge.py: delete _peer_events dead code (#155)'; for dir in /home/josh/The-Inference-Difference /home/josh/ecosystem-monitor /home/josh/Darwin /home/josh/Bunyan /home/josh/Elmer /home/josh/The-Healing-Collective /home/josh/Immunis /home/josh/TrollGuard; do cd "$dir" && git add ng_tract_bridge.py && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m "$MSG" && git push && echo "COMMITTED: $dir" || echo "SKIP: $dir"; done && echo MODULES_DONE

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
path = '/home/josh/docs/punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
if '| 155 |' not in c:
    print('FAILED: #155 row not found'); sys.exit(1)
row_start = c.index('| 155 |')
row_end = c.index('\n', row_start)
row = c[row_start:row_end]
if '**DONE**' in row:
    print('PUNCHLIST_ALREADY_DONE'); sys.exit(0)
new_row = row.replace('| **IN TEST** (2026-04-19) |', '| **DONE** (2026-04-20) — BLK-NG-155: _peer_events deleted, re-vendored to 8 modules |')
if new_row == row:
    new_row = row.replace('| OPEN |', '| **DONE** (2026-04-20) — BLK-NG-155: _peer_events deleted, re-vendored to 8 modules |')
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c[:row_start] + new_row + c[row_end:])
print('PUNCHLIST_UPDATED')
PYEOF

steps.description: Commit punchlist update to docs repo

params.command: cd /home/josh/docs && git add punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md && git commit -m '#155 DONE: _peer_events dead code deleted, re-vendored (BLK-NG-155)' && git push && echo DOCS_DONE
